task_completion.description: Access JFrog Artifactory and log in
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the JFrog Artifactory interface at localhost:8082, and the user is logged in (e.g., admin profile visible).

task_completion.description: Select 'npm' as the package type for a new local repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create Local Repository' screen is open, and 'npm' is selected as the package format.
The 'Repository Key' input field contains exactly 'npm-local'.
The 'Description' or 'Public Description' input field contains exactly 'Local npm package repository'.

task_completion.description: The repository is successfully created and listed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The repositories list or success confirmation shows the 'npm-local' repository of type 'npm' has been created.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to create the repository
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JFrog Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual JFrog Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches JFrog Artifactory, not a text editor or a mock webpage.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running automated scripts or API calls to create the repository are visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target repository key: 'npm-local'. Target repository type: 'local'. Target package type: 'npm'. Target description: 'Local npm package repository'. Artifactory URL: http://localhost:8082. Credentials: admin / password.
